things.name: Historic Centre of Quito
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage best-preserved colonial city centre in Latin America

things.name: Middle of the World Monument (Mitad del Mundo)
things.description: Stand astride the equator 22km north of Quito at the famous yellow line

things.name: Galapagos Islands Trip
things.description: Darwin's evolution laboratory - finches, giant tortoises and blue-footed boobies

things.name: TeleferiQo Cable Car
things.description: Cable car up the flanks of the Pichincha volcano to 4,050m with Quito views

things.name: Church of La Compania de Jesus
things.description: Jesuit baroque church with seven tonnes of gold leaf - South America's most ornate church

things.name: Cotopaxi National Park
things.description: Day trip to the world's highest active volcano (5,897m) with snow-capped cone

things.name: Otavalo Indigenous Market
things.description: Largest indigenous market in South America with Otavalan textiles, 2 hours north

things.name: La Ronda Street
things.description: Restored colonial alley with art galleries, traditional music and local liqueur shots

things.name: Amazon Jungle Tour
things.description: 2-3 day lodge-based tour to Yasuni National Park or the Napo River

things.name: Quito Free Walking Tour
things.description: Colonial architecture with San Francisco convent and Basilica del Voto Nacional
